expectations.evidence: The margin: auto trick only works for HORIZONTAL centering in normal flow. margin: auto on top/bottom does NOT center vertically. The browser interprets auto top/bottom margins as 0
display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; and display: grid; place-items: center;
CRITICAL: Fixed 300px width may be too wide for very small screens, max-width: calc(100% - 32px), width: min(300px, 100%)
Complete CSS with .parent and .child blocks provided
